title: Sturmia lucida

It belongs to the order Diptera and is further classified as part of the superfamily Oestroidea. Sturmia lucida is also known to be part of the subfamily Exoprosopinae, which are parasitic flies that are primarily found in tropical regions. The classification of Sturmia lucida is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships between different species and their place within the broader taxonomic hierarchy.
